data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not confirm the expected behavior of the system when an individual cancels within a group. While the exploratory step outlines the scenario and expected results, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the system correctly handles individual cancellations or produces a clear, actionable failure report. This indicates a gap in the evidence regarding the specific requirement of validating the cancellation scenario.
gaps: No evidence of system behavior for individual cancellation within a group.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify individual cancellation handling
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the system correctly processes individual cancellations within a group and provides appropriate feedback.
